title_en: Look at Them, Mark! Funko Drops a Massive Lineup of Exclusive Invincible Pop! Vinyls for SDCC 2026
summary_en: If you're a fan of the Invincible animated series and Funko Pop! figures, then you're going to be very busy at this year's Comic-Con.
body_en:
Nabbing all the exclusive Funko Pop! collectibles at SDCC is pretty much a full-time job these days. Invincible fans are going to be especially busy this year, as Funko is unleashing an entire wave of exclusive Pops inspired by the hit animated superhero series.
Check out the slideshow gallery below to see all of Funko's SDCC 2026-exclusive POP Animation: Invincible figures:
This Invincible lineup focuses on different variants of Mark Grayson. The standard Invincible figure will be sold every day at the con, while the rest will only be sold on one specific day. The entire lineup includes
Each figure will be available at the Funko booth and on Funko.com. Each comes packaged inside a UV Premium Plastic Pop! Protector case and features a "Summer Convention 2026" sticker.
Comic-Con International: San Diego 2026 will be held from Wednesday, July 22 through Sunday, July 26. Stay tuned to IGN for more SDCC exclusives leading up to the big event.
In other Invincible news, the animated series was recently renewed for Season 6 , though we're still waiting for Season 5 to drop in 2027. For now, be sure to check out IGN's Invincible Season 4 review .
Jesse is a mild-mannered staff writer for IGN. Allow him to lend a machete to your intellectual thicket by following @jschedeen on BlueSky .
